name: python3-drf-spectacular-sidecar-nonfree
title: python3-drf-spectacular-sidecar-nonfree
summary: Serve builds of Swagger UI and Redoc for Django REST framework (Python3)
description:
Serve builds of Swagger UI and Redoc for Django REST framework (Python3)
This package contains a Django app that is an optional addition to
python3-djangorestframework-spectacular, but does not depend on it. It can
also be used independently.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-drf-spectacular-sidecar-nonfree because Serve builds of Swagger UI and Redoc for Django REST framework (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-drf-spectacular-sidecar-nonfree as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-drf-spectacular-sidecar-nonfree with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-drf-spectacular-sidecar-nonfree --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
